title: View Templates that maintain connection/dependency to source for updates

posts.author: celloshred (Michael Wolff)
posts.cookedHtml: For some of my boards, I only want to display specific information at a time. I can do this with different views and filters, but the views are, design wise, always the same. Its the filters that change. If I make design/automation changes to one view in the board, I have to either make them in each or re-make them all after the new template is completed.
